token_family_docs.$description: Density mode — spacing and layout density of containers (compact / standard / spacious). Each value carries the CSS class string the application adds to a container to activate that density. standard is the base. Density also drives the dimension multiplier held alongside the mode values.

selector.$description: Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate compact density.
standard is the base density mode — no class is applied. It is the first-paint default.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate spacious density.

compact.$description: Compact layout density multiplier — optimized for 4px grid alignment.

spacious.$description: Spacious layout density multiplier — optimized for 4px grid alignment.
